title: What is this book
wikitext:
[]: What is this book?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Thu May 27, 2021 8:40 am I have a very important question, do you know what this book is? Because I found it on such an online store and I don't know what's going on, is it official or not?

[]: Re: What is this book?             Quote Post by cyharding » Thu May 27, 2021 8:43 am Well, it says fanbook on the cover, so that means its an amateur production. I have no experience with this doujin, so I can't tell you anything beyond that.

[]: Re: What is this book?             Quote Post by Asugran233 » Thu May 27, 2021 8:51 am Oh, I figured it out, but thanks anyway.
